title: Kanbus clock does not display notifications despite detected events
description:
Observed:
- kanbus_clock logs show event detection and notice dequeue
- device remains on clock, no info cards appear

Expected:
- each detected event enqueues a notice and triggers a transition to info cards

Impact:
- missed notifications

Plan:
- instrument ScenePlayer transitions
- verify queue consumption
- fix rendering/transition path

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Started investigation. Plan:
- add debug instrumentation in ScenePlayer transition start/end
- verify notice queue consumption and transition enqueue
- identify why info scenes not rendering despite detected events
- fix and retest with live device

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Added ScenePlayer debug logging hooks (set_scene/enqueue/transition start/end) gated by --debug via player._debug to trace why notices are not rendering. Next: rerun kanbus_clock with --debug and verify transitions fire when events detected.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Added watcher heartbeat + poll exception logging + scan summary logs when --debug is enabled. Next: restart kanbus_clock and verify watcher sees new events; confirm transitions fire with ScenePlayer debug.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Debug run results:
- watcher sees new events in /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/PyPixoo/project/events
- consumer enqueues transitions; ScenePlayer logs show transition start/end to comment-scene with 30s hold
- still need visual confirmation on device; next step is to verify device IP and observe the comment card during the 30s hold

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Added startup log to print Pixoo IP so we can confirm the device being driven when notifications appear.
